base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hud_coin_icon_cycle — a ui (hud_readout) from 1985 super mario bros. synced with in-world coin_spin animation. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 4-frame HUD coin icon spin — synced with in-world coin_spin animation; displays in HUD next to coin count; 4 zone-palette variants (overworld / underground / castle / underwater)
